reasoning: The control 3.13.4 focuses on preventing unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed by implementing NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that pods do not run with root privileges, and enforcing security policies through admission controllers. These measures help in isolating workloads and preventing data leakage between pods or nodes.
title: 3_13_4: 3.13.4 Prevent unauthorized and unintended information transfer via shared system resources
